summary: Completed testing of new PDF export feature for lecture attendance reports. Backend API tests (6/6 passed) and frontend UI verification confirmed the feature is working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 500 instead of 400/422 for invalid ObjectId format

context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF export feature fully tested and working. Backend endpoint /api/lectures/{lecture_id}/pdf returns valid PDF with Arabic content using Amiri font. Frontend 'تصدير PDF' button visible on take-attendance page with data-testid='export-pdf-btn'. Stats bar on course-lectures page renders horizontally with 4 columns (الكل/مجدولة/منعقدة/ملغاة) using data-testid='lectures-stats-bar'.

tests_performed.test: Backend: PDF export returns valid PDF
tests_performed.notes: GET /api/lectures/{id}/pdf returns 200, Content-Type: application/pdf, valid %PDF-1.4 header, 22KB file

tests_performed.test: Backend: PDF export 404 for non-existent lecture
tests_performed.notes: Returns 404 with Arabic error message 'المحاضرة غير موجودة'

tests_performed.test: Backend: PDF export handles invalid lecture ID
tests_performed.notes: Returns 500 for invalid ObjectId format (minor - could be 400)
'تصدير PDF' button visible on take-attendance page
Stats bar on course-lectures page displays 4 columns horizontally (الكل, مجدولة, منعقدة, ملغاة)
403 error shows inline error UI with retry button (not window.alert)

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - New feature tested, all working correctly
